Package neqsim.process.equipment.separator.entrainment

package neqsim.process.equipment.separator.entrainment
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    neqsim.process.equipment.separator
     
    neqsim.process.equipment.separator.sectiontype
     
  • Class
    Description
    DropletSettlingCalculator
    Calculates terminal settling velocity for droplets/bubbles using the Schiller-Naumann drag correlation, which covers the full range from Stokes (creeping) flow through the intermediate regime to the Newton (turbulent) regime.
    DropletSettlingCalculator.ApiComplianceResult
    Holds the result of an API 12J compliance check for a separator design.
    DropletSizeDistribution
    Represents a droplet (or bubble) size distribution for separator internals calculations.
    DropletSizeDistribution.DistributionType
    Enumeration of supported distribution types.
    GradeEfficiencyCurve
    Grade efficiency curves for separator internals (mist eliminators, inlet devices, gravity sections).
    GradeEfficiencyCurve.InternalsType
    Types of separator internals with published grade efficiency correlations.
    InletDeviceModel
    Models inlet device performance for separator and scrubber design.
    InletDeviceModel.InletDeviceType
    Types of separator inlet devices.
    MultiphaseFlowRegime
    Predicts multiphase flow regime from pipe flow conditions and generates the corresponding inlet droplet size distribution for separator design.
    MultiphaseFlowRegime.FlowRegime
    Enumeration of two-phase gas-liquid flow regimes.
    SeparatorGeometryCalculator
    Precise separator geometry calculations for horizontal and vertical vessels.
    SeparatorInternalsDatabase
    Database of separator internals and inlet device performance data.
    SeparatorInternalsDatabase.InletDeviceRecord
    Data record for an inlet device specification.
    SeparatorInternalsDatabase.InternalsRecord
    Data record for a separator internals specification.
    SeparatorInternalsDatabase.VendorCurveRecord
    Data record for a vendor-certified grade efficiency curve from factory acceptance testing (FAT).
    SeparatorPerformanceCalculator
    Calculates detailed separation performance for a separator or scrubber using droplet size distributions and grade efficiency curves.
    SeparatorPerformanceCalculator.BatchCalibrationSummary
    Summary for batch calibration against multiple cases.
    SeparatorPerformanceCalculator.CalibrationCase
    One field/vendor calibration case with modeled and measured entrainment fractions.
    SeparatorPerformanceCalculator.CalibrationSummary
    Result object for one-point calibration of entrainment factors.
